testcase.name: File Upload Debug Test › should properly upload file and debug filename error
testcase.system-out:
📁 Using CSV file: D:\Project\Kroolo\GravitycARgo_production\input\inventory_data_utf8.csv 📋 Starting comprehensive multi-step test... 🚨 Console Error: Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 (NOT FOUND) ✅ Step 1 loaded ✅ Road transport selected ✅ Step 1 → Step 2 navigation successful ✅ Container selected ✅ Step 2 → Step 3 navigation successful 🔍 DEBUG: Starting file upload process... ✅ Upload zone found ✅ Upload zone is visible ✅ File input found 📁 Uploading file: D:\Project\Kroolo\GravitycARgo_production\input\inventory_data_utf8.csv 📋 File preview visible: true 📄 File: inventory_data_utf8.csv, Size: 1.24 KB ▶️ Next button enabled: true ✅ Step 3 → Step 4 navigation successful 🚀 Testing Step 4 optimization... 🎯 Found 1 optimization buttons ⏯️ Clicking "Start Optimization" button... 📡 Optimization response: 200 OK 🚨 Console Error: Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 (NOT FOUND) 📍 Final URL: http://localhost:5000/optimize 📋 Page title: 3D Container Cargo Visualization Dashboard ⚠️ Some error present but not filename error
📋 SUMMARY: 📝 Console messages: 12 🌐 Network errors: 0
📝 Console messages: 1. [log] Step 1 - Transport Mode Selection loaded 2. [error] Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 (NOT FOUND) 3. [log] Transport option clicked: 1 4. [log] Transport mode input set to: 1 5. [log] Step 2 - Container Selection loaded 6. [log] Loading container options for transport mode: 1 7. [log] Added 9 container options 8. [log] Container selected: Twenty-foot 9. [log] Step 3 - File Upload loaded 10. [log] Step 4 - Settings & Review loaded 11. [warning] cdn.tailwindcss.com should not be used in production. To use Tailwind CSS in production, install it as a PostCSS plugin or use the Tailwind CLI: https://tailwindcss.com/docs/installation 12. [error] Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 (NOT FOUND) ✅ File upload debug test completed
